# Developer lab component contracts

## Hero
- Classes: `.hero`, `.hero-grid`, `.lede`, `.cta-row`
- Rules: emphasize technical value proposition and direct task-oriented CTAs

## Code card
- Classes: `.code-card`, `.code-card pre`
- Rules: show runnable examples and maintain horizontal overflow behavior

## Capability cards
- Classes: `.cards`, `.card`
- Rules: terse headings, explicit status language, no vague labels

## Data tables
- Rules: include clear header cells and keep column labels short and scannable
